confirm.newBlank: This will create a new blank character card, current data will be lost. Are you sure you want to continue?
confirm.clearCard: This will clear the currently loaded character card data and cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to continue?

characterBook.title: Character Book
characterBook.name: Name
characterBook.noCharacterBook: No character book in current character card
characterBook.createCharacterBookTip: You can create a character book to manage character-related information and settings

welcome.title: Welcome to Tavern Translator
welcome.subtitle: Character Card Creation and Translation Tool
welcome.instructions: This is a translation editor tool designed specifically for SillyTavern character cards, which can help you translate character cards between English and Chinese. To get started, click the {uploadButton} button in the left sidebar, or drag and drop your {pngCode} format character card file to this window. If you feel this project is helpful to you, please consider {githubLink}.

error.invalidPng: Please select a valid PNG file
error.invalidJson: Please select a valid JSON file

glossary.title: Translation Glossary
glossary.tip: Add proper nouns, character names, and terms that need consistent translation. The glossary is automatically injected into translation prompts to ensure uniform translations across all fields.
glossary.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all entries? This action cannot be undone.
glossary.importFormatError: Invalid file format. Please use a JSON file exported from this tool.
glossary.empty: Glossary is empty. Add entries to ensure translation consistency.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all chat messages? This action cannot be undone.
aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Describe the character you want to create, or ask a question...
aiChat.appliedFields: Successfully applied {count} fields to the character card
aiChat.noJsonFound: No applicable character card data found

welcome.title: AI Character Card Assistant
welcome.subtitle: I can help you create and improve character cards. Describe the character you want, and I'll generate the content.

quickPrompts.createCharacterPrompt: Help me create an interesting character card with a complete description, personality, scenario, and first message.
quickPrompts.improveDescriptionPrompt: Please review my current character card and help me enhance and enrich the character description to make it more vivid and interesting.
quickPrompts.generateDialoguePrompt: Based on the current character card settings, help me generate sample dialogue that showcases the character's speaking style and personality.
quickPrompts.writeScenarioPrompt: Help me write an interesting scenario for the current character, including the story background and interaction environment.
